title: Real Ai bots do they really work?
author: acean12
selftext: Chat gpt is like a highly intelligent 9yr old. I've made about 50 bots all about 98% but could never quite get it running 100%..what i found is that they are still just just an EA in high heels..but at last..my latest writes ,edits and updates its own script..and is "aware" and autonomously improves. My first was the best.. but uploaded it to chatgpt to fix an issue..n it never worked since.. I spent like a whole month trying to fix it.. anyway I have a fully automated self learning  system  right now that I'm training..looks good so far..can't call it an EA because it doesn't really work like other EA,s. Anyway blood sweat and tears finally paid off..so far..in training..self learning..not algorithmic as such. I will post data in a weeks time and let you know how this self autonomous script works out.

comments.author: Big_Television_2695
comments.body: Thanks for the insights into your progress! I definitely can feel you! Get an AI trading system running is everything but not easy... if you want I could arrange a zoom call with my AI Trading developer. Would that might help you further? (Feel free to DM)
